name: Bread Pudding Made with French Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice bread into 1-inch thick pieces.
2. Butter one side of each slice.
3. Butter a 1 1/2 quart shallow baking dish.
4. Arrange half the bread slices in the dish, buttered sides up, in a single layer.
5. Sprinkle with dried cherries or raisins.
6. Top with another layer of bread slices.
7. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, almond extract, and salt.
8. Whisk in hot milk until combined.
9. Pour the custard over the bread layers.
10. Press the bread into the custard.
11. Let stand for 30 minutes.
12. Press again.
13. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
14. Place the baking dish in a larger baking pan.
15. In a bowl, combine remaining sugar and cinnamon.
16. Sprinkle over the pudding.
17. Pour boiling water into a large pan until it reaches halfway up the side of the dish.
18. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes until golden brown.
19. Serve warm with cream.
